scripts.dev: echo 'It will throw cors error in browser handle it' && vite
scripts.build:android: vite build && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:ios: vite build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.run:android: vite build && npx cap sync android && npx cap run android
scripts.run:ios: vite build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap run ios
scripts.export:android: vite build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && echo 'APK at: android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk'
scripts.export:android:release: vite build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && echo 'APK at: android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-unsigned.apk'
scripts.export:ios: vite build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
